easy.title: Random Dice Roller
easy.description: Return random int 1 to 6 using random module.
easy.solution:
import random
def roll_dice(): return random.randint(1, 6)

medium.title: ISO Date Formatter
medium.description: Return today's date formatted as YYYY-MM-DD string.
medium.solution:
import datetime
def get_today_str(): return datetime.date.today().isoformat()

hard.title: JSON File Data Merger
hard.description: Load two JSON strings and return merged dict using json module.
hard.starterCode:
import json
def merge_json(j1, j2): pass
hard.solution:
import json
def merge_json(j1, j2):
    d1, d2 = json.loads(j1), json.loads(j2)
    return d1 | d2

debugging.title: Fix Local File Shadowing
debugging.buggyCode:
# In file named random.py
import random
debugging.fixedCode:
# Rename file to my_random_test.py
import random
bugs: File name `random.py` shadows Python's `random` stdlib module.
